title: Add UPDATE policy on profiles
description: Add an RLS UPDATE policy to profiles so users can update only their own row, and restrict which columns can be changed.
acceptance_criteria: An UPDATE policy exists on public.profiles
The USING clause checks auth.uid() = id
The WITH CHECK clause also checks auth.uid() = id
Attempting to update another user's profile returns an error or affects 0 rows

steps.details:
CREATE POLICY "Users can update own profile"
ON public.profiles FOR UPDATE
USING (auth.uid() = id)
WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = id);
Using the Supabase JS client with a valid user session, attempt: supabase.from('profiles').update({ display_name: 'Test' }).eq('id', OTHER_USER_ID). Confirm the update affects 0 rows.

technical_notes: Both USING and WITH CHECK are needed: USING filters which rows can be targeted, WITH CHECK prevents changing the id to bypass the policy.
